notes: 4:3 landscape aspect ratio — most common phone JPEG after normalisation. MIN_PIECE_SIDE does not engage (natural side ~139px is well above the 60px floor).
Extreme 20:1 aspect ratio. MIN_GRID forces rows=2; piece side falls below MIN_PIECE_SIDE (60px) because the grid floor wins over the size floor.

forceGrid override: 3×3 = 9 pieces regardless of what computeGrid would produce (300×300 image would otherwise give a much smaller grid). Exercises all three piece classification types: 4 corners, 4 edges, 1 interior — the minimum grid that covers the full filter strip. Used as the dev regression fixture.
